methods.method_name: Statistical Analysis of Pollen and NPP Data
methods.description: This method involves the application of stratigraphically constrained cluster analysis and principal components analysis (PCA) to pollen and non-pollen palynomorphs (NPP) data to define regional and local palynological zones and interpret ecological data.

steps.description: Stratigraphically constrained cluster analysis (total sum of squares method; GRIMM, 1987) was applied to pollen and NPP data to define regional and local palynological zones.
steps.searchable_summary: apply stratigraphically constrained cluster analysis to pollen and NPP data

steps.description: Principal components analysis (PCA) was performed on the transposed data matrices of the regional and local types and NPP.
steps.searchable_summary: perform PCA on transposed data matrices of regional and local types and NPP

steps.description: The data was log-transformed and standardized before analysis, as suggested for compositional data.
steps.searchable_summary: log-transform and standardize data before analysis

steps.description: PCA was performed in the correlation mode and a varimax rotation was applied to maximize the loadings of the variables in the components.
steps.searchable_summary: perform PCA in correlation mode with varimax rotation

steps.description: PCA was done using SPSS 20.0 software.

methods.description: This method describes the physico-chemical treatment for extracting pollen, spores, and other non-pollen palynomorphs (NPP), followed by identification and analysis to interpret regional and local vegetation signals.

steps.description: Physico-chemical treatment for the extraction of pollen, spores and other non-pollen palynomorphs (NPP) followed the procedure described in Ybert et al. (1992).
steps.searchable_summary: perform physico-chemical treatment for pollen and NPP extraction

steps.description: Samples correspond to sections of 1 cm in thickness taken every 10 cm.
steps.searchable_summary: section samples into 1 cm thickness every 10 cm

steps.description: Counting was done at 40 X under the microscope.
steps.searchable_summary: count pollen and NPP at 40X magnification

steps.description: Identification was aided by a reference collection and identification keys and atlases.
steps.searchable_summary: identify pollen using reference collection and keys
